issue_title: Fix rule editor action option loading
issue_body_preview:
# User description
This keeps saved rule action types available while account capabilities are still loading, so existing rules continue to render in the editor.

- Extract action option construction into a helper.
- Preserve saved move-folder and messaging actions even when capability checks are te
test_description_zh: 打开规则编辑器，查看已保存的规则操作项（如移动文件夹、发送消息等动作类型），在页面加载过程中观察这些动作选项是否始终可见和可选择
expected_result_zh: 已保存的规则操作类型（如移动文件夹、发送消息等）在编辑器中应始终正确显示，即使账户能力信息仍在加载中，操作选项也不应消失或变为不可用状态
